meta.question: Will every execution path in this model eventually terminate at an end event? (Model ID: 0b21c69687b64d8886fb7cc5dc56ff6c)
meta.finalAnswer: Yes, all execution paths in the model (ID: 0b21c69687b64d8886fb7cc5dc56ff6c) eventually terminate at an end event. My analysis identified only one node in the model that does not have an outgoing sequence flow, and it is classified as an EndEvent.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "0b21c69687b64d8886fb7cc5dc56ff6c" .
  ?elem a ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem bbo:name ?name . }
}
LIMIT 100

request.reason: I have identified the elements of the model. Now I need to map the properties to understand the flow structure and identify end events.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "0b21c69687b64d8886fb7cc5dc56ff6c" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: I have mapped the properties. Now I will perform a targeted query to identify all nodes that have no outgoing sequence flow, which will help determine if they are end events.
The analysis shows that there is only one node in the model without an outgoing sequence flow, which is an EndEvent. This indicates that all execution paths in the model terminate at this end event.

request.answer: Yes, all execution paths in the model (ID: 0b21c69687b64d8886fb7cc5dc56ff6c) eventually terminate at an end event. My analysis identified only one node in the model that does not have an outgoing sequence flow, and it is classified as an EndEvent.
